channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Supreme Court declines to hear Carter Page case against FBI officials
item.description: The Supreme Court on Monday refused to review Carter Page's lawsuit against former FBI officials involved in what the government now acknowledges was an illegal surveillance.

item.title: Our Ability to Fight Foreign Terrorism Just Got Weaker
item.description: The expiration of FISA Section 702 creates a gap in national security capabilities that the president must now address.

item.title: The End of Rec League
item.description: No one warned me about the vicarious joys of youth sports when the participants are our sons.

item.title: The Real America
item.description: World Cup tourists are discovering the hidden secret of American abundance, which we intend to preserve and defend for years to come.
